□ X □ X X

□ X X □ □

content.thinking:

The first position is □ (empty), but the second position is X (filled). So this does NOT start with two consecutive empty cells.

Second grid top row:

The first position is X (filled), not empty. So this does NOT start with two consecutive empty cells.

Third grid top row:

The answer is the third grid.
